# On Prediction

> A curated prediction market knowledge hub for builders, investors & researchers.

## About

On Prediction indexes articles, papers, podcasts, and tweets about prediction markets — tagged with concepts and organized by category and difficulty. It also hosts a community forum for prediction market practitioners.

## Main Pages

- Homepage (articles): https://onprediction.xyz/
- Concepts: https://onprediction.xyz/concepts
- Forum: https://onprediction.xyz/forum

## Machine-Readable Data

- Articles JSON: https://onprediction.xyz/api/articles.json
- Concepts JSON: https://onprediction.xyz/api/concepts.json
- RSS Feed: https://onprediction.xyz/feed.xml
- Full content dump: https://onprediction.xyz/llms-full.txt

## Categories

Articles are organized into: Fundamentals, Design, Microstructure, Platforms, Applications, Business, Commentary.

## Concept Clusters

Concepts are grouped into 6 clusters: Oracle & Resolution, Liquidity & Trading, Information Theory, Mechanism Design, Governance & Decisions, Business & Platforms.
